message:
feat(parser): add regex literal parsing support

- Add Expression::RegExpLiteral { pattern, flags } to AST
- Add parse_regexp_literal() for /pattern/flags syntax
- Handle escaped slashes and character classes in patterns
- Add IR1 lowering via HostCall to regexp:create
- Update canonical_value() and Display for RegExpLiteral

Part of bd-6a61n.1.7 (Regular Expression Substrate).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
